name: Grant's Fry Batter
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except flour in a bowl and blend well.
2. Dip fish or seafood (such as bass, crappie, oysters, frog legs, shrimp, etc.) into the egg batter.
3. Roll the seafood in flour before frying.
4. Fry in moderately hot oil until golden brown. If the oil is too hot, the batter may burn.
5. Vegetables like eggplant and squash can also be fried in this batter.
6. Strip fish into thin strips before dipping them into the batter.
